turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Hi, um, actually this is Robert Lin. I'm calling to cancel an appointment I have coming up, and I just want to make sure it’s fully cancelled.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics, part of Pretty Good AI. Am I speaking with Daniel?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Please tell me your date of birth.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Sure, my full name is Robert Lin.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Please tell me your full name first and last one more time.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Please tell me your last name and date of birth.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: My last name is Lin, and my date of birth is January 5th, 1972.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Sure, it's Robert, R-O-B-E-R-T, and Lin, L-I-N.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Please spell your first name and last name for me.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: please spell your last name again and include your date of birth.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Sure, my last name is Lin, L-I-N, and my date of birth is January 5th, 1972.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Do you want to use a phone number to look up your record?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: If that helps, sure. The number you have on file should be the same one I’m calling from now.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Please tell me the phone number on file.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: I’m sorry, I don’t have it memorized right now. Maybe you can pull it up from the number I’m calling from?
